excerpt: OpenAI is forming a new company to deploy AI, and the other labs aren't far behind, reinforcing the thesis that AI's impact will require top-down implementation. Then, Apple has economic reasons to work with Intel.

title: The Deployment Company, Back to the 70s, Apple and Intel
